## GEO Method Effectiveness (Princeton Research)
- FAQ schema + cite-sources combination = highest single-page impact
- Content freshness (< 30 days) doubles AI citation probability for ChatGPT
- Claude indexes via Brave Search, not Google — separate indexing needed
